name: RaceIQ F3
summary: Sprint, feature-race, and championship forecasts for FIA Formula 3.
description: The third series on the MotorsportVerse core, built at RaceIQ F2 parity: a leakage-safe driver-skill blend (Elo with rookie pooling + finishing history + optional gradient-boosted signal) routed through two race-type heads — a merit feature race and a reverse-top-12 sprint — with Monte Carlo win/podium probabilities, finishing-range intervals, and a sprint+feature-aware championship projection over the 30-car grid. Runs on the real 2026 FIA Formula 3 season: official results are scraped into a committed, reviewable snapshot via the shared FIA feeder-series source, with model forecasts for upcoming rounds. Experimental while forward accuracy accrues over real rounds.
datasets: fiaformula3.com (official results, scraped to a committed snapshot)
